news_items.headline: Oil futures face new pressure as the US and Iran trade threats to strike key infrastructure
news_items.description: Trump said the US would attack Iran's power plants if it didn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz in 48 hours. Iran responded on Sunday with is own threats.

news_items.description: Donald Trump's attempt to force Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell out of office appears destined to backfire spectacularly, with the botched criminal prosecution potentially extending Powell's stay rather than shortening it.According to reporting from Yahoo…

news_items.headline: War more than six months would hit global economy, TotalEnergies boss says
news_items.description: Global economies face serious damage if the Middle East conflict extends beyond six months.  TotalEnergies CEO Patrick Pouyanne stated this on Sunday.  The closure of the Strait of Hormuz is blocking ten million barrels of oil daily.  Current inventories can …

news_items.headline: Where is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran’s new Supreme Leader? Even the CIA and Mossad are unable to find him
news_items.description: Iran Supreme Leader: Both U.S. intelligence and Israeli officials are reportedly equally surprised as they are trying to gather accurate inputs about current whereabouts of Mojtaba Khamenei.

news_items.headline: Did Israel miscalculate Iranian military capabilities?
news_items.description: Iranian attacks on Arad and Dimona near Israeli nuclear site raise serious questions about Israel's defence strategy.
